instructions: This is a containerized development environment - Docker/Podman is NOT available inside.
Tests requiring Docker or Testcontainers CANNOT run in this environment.
Identify which tests require containers and skip them using project-specific methods.
Focus on unit tests and non-container integration tests.
Check project documentation for how to skip container-based tests.
environment_notes: No Docker daemon - this is intentional for security and simplicity
Network access available for downloading dependencies and API calls
Mounted directories have full read/write via user namespace mapping
Git operations work but SSH keys not mounted (cannot push without adding them)
Available tools: Java (17, 21, 25), Maven, Python, Node.js, gRPC tools
Modern CLI tools: ripgrep (rg), fd, bat, gh, grpcurl, jq, tree
recommended_workflow: Read project-specific CLAUDE.md or README.md for project instructions
Run tests that can execute in this environment
Document any tests that need manual verification on host
Use grpcurl or curl for manual API testing where applicable
